name: Country Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the shortening, sugar, and eggs.
3. Stir in the cooked pumpkin and water.
4. Mix together the flour, baking powder, soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients.
6. Fold in the black walnuts and raisins.
7. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 9x5-inch loaf pans.
8. Bake for one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
9. Yield: 2 loaves
